# Full decision-architecture network {#sec-appendix-full-diagram}

The figure below restores the full decision-architecture network used throughout @sec-03-decision-function, including minor and non-significant paths. Thick solid edges indicate backbone pillars, thin solid edges indicate secondary but substantively relevant links, and dotted edges display weaker or non-significant pathways that remain useful for completeness.

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-full-equations-diagram
%%| fig-cap: "Full decision-architecture network with coefficient annotations. Thick = backbone pillars, thin = secondary significant paths, dotted = weak or non-significant paths. Edges summarise conditional associations from the coordinated regression family (P/B/S models), not a single jointly-estimated SEM."
---
config:
    layout: elk
    flowchart:
        curve: basis
    theme: base
    themeVariables:
        lineColor: "#475569"
        tertiaryColor: "#94a3b8"
        fontFamily: "Roboto, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif"
        edgeLabelBackground: "#f8fafc"
---
flowchart TB

    %% ================= STYLING =================
    classDef upstream     fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#1d4ed8,stroke-width:1px,color:#0f172a;
    classDef disp         fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#4f46e5,stroke-width:1px,color:#111827;
    classDef exper        fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#db2777,stroke-width:1px,color:#4a044e;
    classDef risk         fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#f59e0b,stroke-width:1px,color:#78350f;
    classDef disease      fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#b91c1c,stroke-width:1px,color:#7f1d1d;
    classDef attitudes    fill:#ecfdf3,stroke:#22c55e,stroke-width:1px,color:#022c22;
    classDef behaviour    fill:#fdf2ff,stroke:#a855f7,stroke-width:2px,color:#4c1d95;
    classDef habit        fill:#f3e8ff,stroke:#6b21a8,stroke-width:1px,color:#3b0764;
    classDef norms        fill:#fffdf7,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:1px,color:#7c2d12;

    %% ================= NODES =================
    %% Use explicit label/id form to ensure the subgraph title renders
    subgraph UP["Upstream ideology & institutions"]
        SMTRUST["Trust in social media"]
        PROG["Progressive attitudes"]
        INST["Institutional trust"]
    end
    class PROG,INST,SMTRUST upstream;

    subgraph DISP["Vaccine-specific dispositions"]
        PVAX["Pro-vaccine 5C index"]
    end
    class PVAX disp;
    style DISP fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#4f46e5,stroke-width:1px,color:#0f172a;

    subgraph EXP["Experiential narratives"]
        SIDEFX["Side effects (self / others)"]
    end
    class SIDEFX exper;
    style EXP fill:#fff7fb,stroke:#db2777,stroke-width:1px,color:#4a044e;

    subgraph RISK["Risk perceptions & fear"]
        VRISK["Vaccine risk"]
        VFEAR["Vaccine fear"]
        DFEAR["Disease fear"]
    end
    class VRISK,VFEAR risk;
    class DFEAR disease;
    style RISK fill:#e8f1fa,stroke:#0f172a,stroke-width:1px,color:#0f172a;

    subgraph ATT["Attitudes toward vaccination"]
        VIMP["Vaccine importance"]
    end
    class VIMP attitudes;
    style ATT fill:#edf7f2,stroke:#22c55e,stroke-width:1px,color:#022c22;

    subgraph HAB["Habit"]
        PAST["Pre-pandemic Flu habit"]
    end
    class PAST habit;
    style HAB fill:#f8f2ff,stroke:#6b21a8,stroke-width:1px,color:#3b0764;

    subgraph BEH["Prevention behaviours"]
        FLU["Flu vaccination"]
        COVIDWILL["COVID booster willingness"]
        NPI["NPIs (Masking/Home stay)"]
    end
    class FLU,COVIDWILL,NPI behaviour;
    style UP fill:#e7effb,stroke:#1d4ed8,stroke-width:1px,color:#0f172a;
    style BEH fill:#e7ecf8,stroke:#111827,stroke-width:1px,color:#0f172a;

    subgraph NORM["Norms & moral commitments"]
        FAMNORM["Family progressive climate"]
        FRIENDNORM["Friends progressive climate"]
        COLNORM["Colleagues progressive climate"]
        MORAL["Care/Fairness (MFQ)"]
    end
    class FAMNORM,FRIENDNORM,COLNORM,MORAL norms;
    style NORM fill:#fffdf7,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:1px,color:#7c2d12;

    %% ================= LINKS =================
    %% Key:
    %% ==> (Thick) = Backbone / Dominant Effects
    %% --> (Thin) = Standard Significant Effects
    %% -.-> (Dotted) = Weak / Non-Significant

    %% --- 1. Upstream -> Dispositions ---
    PROG -->|"PROG → PVAX (β = 0.25)"| PVAX
    SMTRUST -->|"SMTRUST → PVAX (β = -0.17)"| PVAX
    INST -->|"INST → PVAX (β = 0.11)"| PVAX

    %% --- 2. Dispositions to Risk (The Safety Channel) ---
    PVAX   -->|"PVAX → VRISK (β = -0.23)"| VRISK
    PVAX   -->|"PVAX → VFEAR (β = -0.19)"| VFEAR

    %% Side effects and Media (Secondary inputs)
    SMTRUST -.->|"SMTRUST → VRISK (β = 0.09)"| VRISK
    SIDEFX -.->|"SIDEFX → VRISK (β = 0.22)"| VRISK
    SIDEFX -.->|"SIDEFX → VFEAR (β = 0.07)"| VFEAR

    %% Internal Risk Structure
    VRISK  ==>|"VRISK → VFEAR (β = 0.46)"| VFEAR

    %% --- 3. The Disease Fear Pillar ---
    %% Note: Driven by context, drives all behaviors
    PROG -->|"PROG → DFEAR (β = 0.17)"| DFEAR
    SMTRUST -.->|"SMTRUST → DFEAR (β = 0.20)"| DFEAR
    DFEAR ==>|"DFEAR → COVIDWILL (β = 0.32)"| COVIDWILL
    DFEAR ==>|"DFEAR → FLU (β = 0.34)"| FLU
    DFEAR -->|"DFEAR → NPI (β = 0.19)"| NPI

    %% --- 4. Attitudes (The Ideological Channel) ---
    %% Progressive -> Importance is massive (1.64)
    PROG  ==>|"PROG → VIMP (β = 1.62)"| VIMP
    PVAX  ==>|"PVAX → VIMP (β = 0.67)"| VIMP
    INST  -->|"INST → VIMP (β = 0.41)"| VIMP
    VRISK -->|"VRISK → VIMP (β = -0.21)"| VIMP

    %% --- 5. Behavioural Outputs ---
    %% Importance drives COVID, but not Flu
    VIMP  -->|"VIMP → COVIDWILL (β = 0.27)"| COVIDWILL
    VIMP  -.->|"VIMP → FLU (ns)"| FLU

    %% Fear blocks Flu specifically
    VFEAR ==>|"VFEAR → FLU (β = -0.49)"| FLU

    %% --- 6. The Habit Pillar (The Flu Driver) ---
    PAST ===>|"PAST → FLU (β = 2.09)"| FLU

    %% --- 7. NPI Specifics ---
    %% NPIs are driven by Safety, Fear, and Ideology
    PROG -->|"PROG → NPI (β = 0.12)"| NPI
    VRISK -->|"VRISK → NPI (β = -0.05)"| NPI
    FRIENDNORM -.->|"Friends norms → NPI (β = 0.04)"| NPI
    MORAL -->|"Care/Fairness → NPI (β = 0.17)"| NPI

    %% --- 8. Norms structure ---
    PROG ==>|"PROG → Family norms (β = 0.55)"| FAMNORM
    PROG ==>|"PROG → Friends norms (β = 0.49)"| FRIENDNORM
    PROG ==>|"PROG → Colleague norms (β = 0.46)"| COLNORM
    FAMNORM -->|"Family norms → COVIDWILL (β = 0.11)"| COVIDWILL
```

:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}

![](_generated/mermaid/fig-full-equations-diagram.png){#fig-full-equations-diagram fig-cap="Full decision-architecture network with coefficient annotations. Thick = backbone pillars, thin = secondary significant paths, dotted = weak or non-significant paths. Edges summarise conditional associations from the coordinated regression family (P/B/S models), not a single jointly-estimated SEM." fig-align="center" fig-pos="H"}

:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}

![](_generated/mermaid/fig-full-equations-diagram.png){#fig-full-equations-diagram fig-cap="Full decision-architecture network with coefficient annotations. Thick = backbone pillars, thin = secondary significant paths, dotted = weak or non-significant paths. Edges summarise conditional associations from the coordinated regression family (P/B/S models), not a single jointly-estimated SEM." fig-align="center" fig-pos="H"}

:::
